prompt:
A luxury fashion editorial portrait of a confident young woman seated elegantly in the center of an oversized plush faux fur armchair, wearing a premium pastel pink faux fur coat, fitted white trousers, and clean white lace up combat boots. She sits with legs crossed, hands gently resting in her lap, maintaining a calm, powerful expression while looking directly into the camera.

Six majestic long haired Persian cats are perfectly arranged symmetrically around her, two perched on the chair’s backrest, two resting on each armrest, and two sitting gracefully on the floor beside the chair. Each cat has fluffy, well groomed fur in soft cream, silver, gray, and white tones, remaining calm and regal.

The chair is covered in luxurious pink faux fur matching the outfit, placed against a seamless pastel pink studio backdrop and floor for a monochromatic high fashion aesthetic. Soft diffused studio lighting creates smooth shadows, flattering skin tones, glossy fur textures, and crisp detail throughout the scene.

Centered composition, perfect symmetry, Vogue magazine editorial style, luxury fashion campaign, premium studio photography, minimalist aesthetic, ultra realistic, hyper detailed facial features, realistic cat fur, cinematic color grading, shallow depth of field, medium full body shot, 85mm lens, f/2.8, HDR, ray tracing, 8K, masterpiece, photorealistic.
